pi_items.source: Web search confirmed 'privacy.resistFingerprinting.letterboxing' is the standard Tor Browser/Firefox preference. Verified via setup_task.sh and export_result.sh scripts querying prefs.js.
Verified via task description instructions, setup_task.sh cleanup operations, and export_result.sh target file checks.
Verified via verifier.py which uses regular expressions explicitly checking for these exact substrings to parse the dimensions.

privileged_info_summary: The target Tor Browser preference to disable letterboxing is confirmed to be 'privacy.resistFingerprinting.letterboxing'. The expected audit report file must be created at '/home/ga/Documents/letterboxing_audit.txt' and must exactly include the labels 'Letterboxed Width:', 'Letterboxed Height:', 'Unconstrained Width:', and 'Unconstrained Height:' for the verifier to successfully extract the dimensions.
